llm._comment_provider: Use 'api' (requires api_key) or 'cli' (requires LLM CLI in PATH, uses subscription). NOTE: provider and api_key are read at startup only — changing them requires a daemon restart, /reload_config has no effect.
llm._comment_cli_binary: Required when provider is 'cli'. Name of the CLI binary in PATH.
llm._comment_usage_poll: Seconds between /usage polls (cli provider only). 0 = disabled.

agents._comment_po_timeout: Seconds the PO waits for child tasks to complete. Actual wall time per PO task = decompose_time + po_timeout_seconds + synthesize_time.

model_tiers._comment: Tier aliases → model IDs. To upgrade all 'best'-class agents: change 'best' here. Values in 'models' may reference these tier names or use direct model IDs.

models._comment: Per-agent model overrides. Values can be tier aliases (fast/balanced/best) or direct model IDs. Omit any key to use the hardcoded tier default.

coder._comment: Per-stage overrides for CodeTeam pipeline. Supports tier aliases.

web._comment_trusted_proxy: Set to true when running behind Cloudflare Tunnel or nginx reverse proxy. Enables CF-Connecting-IP / X-Forwarded-For for real client IP (needed for accurate rate limiting).

spending._comment: Set limits to prevent unexpected costs. null = unlimited.

model_pricing._comment: USD per 1M tokens. Update when prices change. Omit unknown models.

tts._comment: TTS provider: 'elevenlabs' for high-quality voices (API key required), 'gtts' for offline fallback.
tts._comment_stt: Same elevenlabs_api_key is used for speech-to-text (voice message transcription).

email._comment_smtp: SMTP for sending. Proton Mail: smtp.protonmail.ch:587 (STARTTLS) or Bridge at host:1025 (smtp_tls: false).
email._comment_imap: IMAP for reading. Proton Mail: imap.protonmail.ch:993 or Bridge at host:1143.

github._comment: gh CLI token (GH_TOKEN). Needs repo scope for read; repo+write for mutations. gh must be in PATH (installed in Docker image).
